title: Glimp's White Mud
description: Changes mud bricks and packed mud textures with mushroom stem palette
body:
Changes mud bricks and packed mud textures with more light shades.
Uses mushroom stem palette.


CHANGES

  • packed mud
  • mud bricks (including slabs and stairs)
  • double mud bricks slabs - pillar
  • mud bricks wall - posts are pillars too, walls itself use packed mud texture
all blocks

You are not allowed to use textures and resoursepack:
  • in third-party projects
  • for training AI

Use in modpacks is allowed
